[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-international-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_column_text]

Naturally, any vacation where you share experiences and make memories as a couple will bring you closer, but nothing can match the excitement when you check-in as a married couple for the first time. Also, the first time the receptionist addresses you as Mr. & Mrs., it hits really hard that you’re in this together. Trust ATW Travels to ensure a seamless honeymoon vacation experience if you’re planning your first romantic getaway. Choose from dozens of destinations and hundreds of honeymoon packages curated just for you.

[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Is Mauritius the Best Place for A Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

A subtropical beauty in the heart of the Indian Ocean, Mauritius is a popular honeymoon thanks to its white sandy beaches, lagoons, multicolored coral reefs, and exotic wildlife. No wonder Mark Twain considered it to the prototype upon which heaven was copied. Visit us to magnify the romantic experience with budget Mauritius honeymoon packages customized especially for you.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19460″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Things To Remember When Choosing Mauritius Honeymoon Packages”][vc_column_text]

  • Beaches are fun, but they can get super-hot as the day progresses. Remember to carry plenty of water-resistant sunscreen lotion to avoid the UV rays that could potentially harm your skin and eyes.
  • As much as you’d love to sunbathe topless on the beach, Mauritius has no nudist beaches. Topless sunbathing is not tolerated on private beaches or at resorts.
  • Mauritius is a Hindu country with myriad temples. While they welcome strangers, you must respect their culture and not touch the idols or other religious artifacts.
  • The best time to visit Mauritius is between October through December, when there’s warm and dry weather. But if you’re looking for cheap Mauritius honeymoon packages, book a vacation between May and September. This is the wet season, with the island experiencing as many as nine inches of rain.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How Much Does a Mauritius Honeymoon Package Cost?”][vc_column_text]

Package prices depend on several factors, including the number of days you’re planning to stay, accommodation preferences, addon services chosen, etc.

Mauritius can be quite expensive for some if you just stick to high-end resorts and hotels.

At ATW Travels, our Mauritius honeymoon packages usually range from INR 15,000 to INR 20,000 and go up to INR 3,00,000 or more, depending on how it is customized.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646219711622{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

+91 9693339999

[/vc_column_text][vc_separator el_width=”30″][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-envelope” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786244533{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

info@atwtravels.com

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1653551426739{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Dream Vacay Today!

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Which Part of Mauritius Is Best for Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

Mauritius is a stunning island surrounded by pristine beaches and beautiful coral reefs set against the backdrop of amazing mountains sculpted by volcanoes.

The east coast is preferred by honeymooners who love to bask in the powdery white beaches, while the flat and calm shores of the west coast are loved by people vacationing with their children.

North Mauritius is a tourist hub with plenty of hotels, resorts, and other entertainment options. The south offers magnificent views of the vast sugarcane fields and the mountains and has plenty of historical attractions, including Pointe Canon, The Naval Museum, and Ferney Valley.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Choose ATW Travels?”][vc_column_text]

ATW Travels has been curating vacation packages since 1968. We have arranged customized vacations to destinations across the world. Our team will cover everything, including airport transfers, accommodation, complimentary breakfast, and sightseeing.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19461″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Are Some of The Best Beaches in Mauritius for Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

Mauritius attracts visitors worldwide with its sparkling teal lagoons, multi-coloured coral reefs, gorgeous green mountains, rainforests, and exotic wildlife. Here are some of the best beaches that are included on most Mauritius honeymoon packages:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Trou Aux Biches Beach” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

The crystal-clear shimmering water is ideal for couples looking to spend some romantic time away from the crowd.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Tamarin Beach” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This beach is famous for its black sand and strong currents. It is perfect for sea-bathing and surfing. And if you’re lucky, you can see beautiful dolphins swimming in its turquoise waters.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Flic En Flac Beach” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This is one of the longest beaches in Mauritius. Tourists and locals love this beach because of its shining calm waters, scenic sunsets, coconut trees, and whimsical ambiance.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Pereybere Beach” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This is it is one of the most popular beaches visited by couples. Dive in the deep blue sea, go snorkelling, or observe the miracles of nature while sunbathing on the beach.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19462″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Which Are Some of The Things You Must Do in Mauritius?”][vc_column_text]

Apart from the beautiful beaches and lagoons, there is so much you can do during your stay in this island paradise. Here are a few attractions that could be included in your Mauritius honeymoon packages.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Visit The Chamarel Village” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This quaint village in the south of Mauritius is famous for its multi-coloured earth, with hues ranging from yellows and purple to orange and red. The place is locally called The Seven Coloured Earth.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Visit The Ile Aux Cerfs” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This Treasure Island is located off the east coast and is renowned for its picturesque beaches. It is one of the most popular honeymoon attractions, offering plenty of activities, including parasailing, cave sea kayaking, ziplining, and undersea walking.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Book A Session At A Wellness Spa” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

One cannot go to Mauritius and not get its famous Mauritian Spa. You can choose from a mix of Indian, Chinese, African, and European Therapeutic Spas.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Go Skydiving” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

If you and your partner are true adventurers, don’t miss out on this extreme sport on the island’s northeast.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Bet At The Champ De Mars” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

It’s an absolute pleasure to watch thoroughbred horses race themselves. You can also join in the fun as locals don their finest dresses and hats to bet on powerful racehorses. The Champ De Mars racecourse is the 2nd oldest in the world.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19463″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Which Are Some of The Best Hotels and Resorts to Stay in Mauritius for Your Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

Mauritius has some of the most luxurious resorts and hotels in the world. Here’s a list of some of the places found in some of the best Mauritius honeymoon tour packages:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Paradise Cove Boutique Hotel” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

An adult’s only retreat, couples can enjoy in the infinity pool with the best sea and bay views in the lap of luxury.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”LUX Belle Mare” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

A five-pearl property with a timeless vibe, this luxurious property is equipped with heated pools, private outdoor areas, a microbrewery, and the largest swimming pool on the island.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Constance Prince Maurice” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Constance Prince Maurice is a remote beachfront boutique resort with beautiful pools, luxurious spas offering hydro-therapy pools, and yoga with stunning views of the calm lagoon.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Radisson Blu Poste Lafayette Resort & Spa” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Especially for couples and honeymooners, it is an intimate resort that offers couples privacy and much-needed solitude.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Mauritius is known for its hospitality, a beautiful island known for exploring, with botanical gardens, Indian temples, colonial houses, exotic marine life, and wildlife. These magical elements of Mauritius are what make it so popular amongst honeymooners. At ATW Travels, we can help with all the preparations with our Mauritius honeymoon packages and augment your overall experience.

Follow our Instagram profile to know about the latest offers and discounts.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

FAQs

What Is the Best Time to Honeymoon in Mauritius?
Mauritius has pleasant weather throughout the year, but winters in Mauritius are the best time for couples to experience great weather and have a good time.
Which Is the Best Month to Visit Mauritius?
May to December is some of the best months to visit Mauritius for honeymooners. The weather is excellent, and you get to have a good surfing time alongside quad biking and hiking.
How Many Days Are Enough for Mauritius Trip?
A week is more than enough to enjoy the natural beauty and the scenic beaches that Mauritius offers.
Is Mauritius Safe for Honeymoon Couples?
Yes, Mauritius is more than safe for couples. It’s the perfect destination for a honeymoon as couples can do so much, from skydiving beach hopping to exploring temples, scuba diving, and revelling in Mauritian Spa.
How Can I Reach Mauritius?
The most efficient way to reach Mauritius is to either take a flight and land at Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam International Airport or board a holiday cruise.
How Can I Travel Within Mauritius?
Buses are the cheapest and most convenient way to get around in Mauritius. You can also drive a car or motorbike as petrol is relatively inexpensive. There are taxis available too if you don’t want to get in the hassle of driving.
What Are the Visa Requirements for International Travellers Visiting Mauritius?
Tourists travelling to Mauritius from India can avail ‘Visa on Arrival’ option and pick up their Visa Documents from the immigration desk after reaching. To avail this visa, you must possess an Indian Passport (valid for at least six months from the date you travel), return tickets, proof of accommodation, and proof of income that will show the expenses covered on your trip.
